en: Then the word of the LORD came to Jonah the second time, saying,
zh: 耶和華的話再次臨到約拿，說：

en: "Arise, go to Nineveh, that great city, and call out against it the message that I tell you."
zh: “起來！到尼尼微大城去，向其中的居民宣告我所吩咐你的話。”

en: So Jonah arose and went to Nineveh, according to the word of the LORD. Now Nineveh was an exceedingly great city, three days' journey in breadth.
zh: 約拿就動身，照耶和華的話往尼尼微去了，這尼尼微是一座極大的城 ，要三天才能走完。

en: Jonah began to go into the city, going a day's journey. And he called out, "Yet forty days, and Nineveh shall be overthrown!"
zh: 約拿進城，走了一天，就宣告說：“再過四十天，尼尼微就要毀滅了。”

en: And the people of Nineveh believed God. They called for a fast and put on sackcloth, from the greatest of them to the least of them.
zh: 尼尼微人信了 神，就宣告禁食，從大到小，都穿上麻衣。

en: The word reached the king of Nineveh, and he arose from his throne, removed his robe, covered himself with sackcloth, and sat in ashes.
zh: 這事傳到尼尼微王那裡，他就起來，離開寶座，脫去王袍，披上麻衣，坐在爐灰中。

en: And he issued a proclamation and published through Nineveh, "By the decree of the king and his nobles: Let neither man nor beast, herd nor flock, taste anything. Let them not feed or drink water,
zh: 他又傳諭全尼尼微，說：“王和大臣有令：‘人、畜、牛、羊，都不准嘗甚麼，不准吃，也不准喝。

en: but let man and beast be covered with sackcloth, and let them call out mightily to God. Let everyone turn from his evil way and from the violence that is in his hands.
zh: 不論人畜，都要披上麻衣；各人要懇切呼求 神，悔改，離開惡行，摒棄手中的強暴。

en: Who knows? God may turn and relent and turn from his fierce anger, so that we may not perish."
zh: 或者 神回心轉意，不發烈怒，使我們不致滅亡。’”

en: When God saw what they did, how they turned from their evil way, God relented of the disaster that he had said he would do to them, and he did not do it.
zh: 神看見他們所作的，就是悔改離開惡行， 神就轉意，不把所說的災禍降在他們身上了。
